artPrompt: A burly goblin warrior in a rumpled vest looms in a back-room doorway, cracking thick knuckles with a slow grin, one fist foreshortened huge toward the viewer while a single amber lamp rims his broad silhouette in warm light and drops the rest of him into ink shadow. Cigar smoke threads past his tusks, a worn card table glints behind, intimate menace. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Leg-Breaker Lou
text:
Deathtouch
{B}, Sacrifice a Favor token: Target creature an opponent controls gets -1/-1 until end of turn. Lou collects in kneecaps.
flavorText: He's not a bad goblin. He just has a job, and the job is your shins.
